evidence: CLAUDE.md explicitly mandates SDD workflow with /sdd:start → /sdd:implement → /sdd:complete
specs/ directory with constitution/ and features/ must be bootstrapped before feature cycles
Ideation/ documentation created before any implementation cycles
changes/ holds active spec-delta.md files before implementation
archive/ preserves completed cycles as historical record
specs_first_workflow.description: Repository enforces STD-001 Spec-Driven Development — all behavior changes require an active cycle with spec-delta.md before any implementation

evidence: CLAUDE.md: behavior changes require active cycle in changes/{slug}/ or /sdd:start
Commit conventions: [spec] for spec changes, [impl] for code, [archive] for cycle archival
CODEOWNERS requires @salmanulhaq-dl @ilian-disrupt @mobeendisrupt review on all PRs
CI workflow validates STD-002 compliance on every PR
spec_driven_pr_patterns.description: All behavior-changing features must have spec-delta before implementation; CODEOWNERS enforces review; CI validates structural compliance
